title:
I don't think we'll ever see altseason back. 

Most of the altcoins will die and have literally no purpose in this ecosy
content:
I don't think we'll ever see altseason back. 

Most of the altcoins will die and have literally no purpose in this ecosystem. 

That's just the harsh reality of the market and that's not bad.

The teams and protocols that are innovative and provide an ecosystem in which value accruals towards the ecosystem themselves, that makes sense to be sustaining a token itself.

Other than that, there's only, mostly been a purpose of generating and making money for the founders and/or VCs or market makers that have been trading them. 

Only 1% of the tokens make sense and that's why investing into #Altcoins has become more complex.

The only window where we'll be seeing more momentum into those altcoins will be in the end phase of the cycle, that will likely be late in 2027 or even in 2028.

Before that, we'll only see strength in tokens that have value accrual or when there's a hype narrative taking place.

title: 吴说获悉，L2Beat 表示已从源代码重新生成了 Lighter 永续合约 DEX L2 所使用的所有 ZK 电路（包括 Lighter verifier 和 Lighter Desert verifier），从而实现了真正无需信任 Lig
content: 吴说获悉，L2Beat 表示已从源代码重新生成了 Lighter 永续合约 DEX L2 所使用的所有 ZK 电路（包括 Lighter verifier 和 Lighter Desert verifier），从而实现了真正无需信任 Lighter 团队的无权限紧急退出，这意味着用户可以独立生成 ZK 证明来证明自己在 L2 上的账户状态，并在 L1 上通过 Desert verifier 完成资金提取，即使 sequencer 出现故障或恶意行为也不会被卡住。此前，Solana 联创 toly 批评 Lighter 是另一种形式的 CEX。https://t.co/Y9ebmOPmeM

title: 吴说获悉，Solana Labs 联合创始人 Anatoly Yakovenko（toly）在回应有关 Hyperliquid 去中心化程度的讨论时表示，他对所有 L2 也提出过同样批评：判断一个系统是否 permissionless，关键
content:
吴说获悉，Solana Labs 联合创始人 Anatoly Yakovenko（toly）在回应有关 Hyperliquid 去中心化程度的讨论时表示，他对所有 L2 也提出过同样批评：判断一个系统是否 permissionless，关键在于用户能否在不经可信第三方批准的情况下，使用自己的资源参与协议栈的任何部分。若不能，就不是 permissionless。toly 称，无论用户怎么做，都无法运行 Base 排序器或 Hyperliquid 排序器，因此这与他所批评的 L2 问题相同。
https://t.co/nV9KWE6oOP

title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI), up 3.7%, leads index higher
content:
C oinDesk Indices presents its daily market update, highlighting the performance of leaders and laggards in the CoinDesk 20 Index .

The CoinDesk 20 is currently trading at 2064.22, up 0.7% (+14.51) since 4 p.m. ET on Tuesday.

Fifteen of the 20 assets are trading higher.

Leaders: UNI (+3.7%) and TAO (+2.1%). Laggards: XLM (-0.6%) and BCH (-0.6%).

The CoinDesk 20 is a broad-based index traded on multiple platforms in several regions globally.

NEAR Protocol (NEAR), up 2.8%, was also a top performer.
